# Quantum Hackathons

> Global directory of past, current, and upcoming quantum computing hackathons, maintained by qBraid.

Source: https://www.quantumhackathons.com | Last generated: 2026-04-20

## About

Quantum Hackathons is an open, community-maintained directory of quantum computing hackathons held around the world. The site is maintained by qBraid, a hardware-agnostic quantum computing platform headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, and serves as a free resource for students, researchers, developers, and industry professionals looking to participate in quantum programming challenges.

Currently tracking 48 events (7 upcoming). Events can be submitted by emailing brian.pearson@qbraid.com.

## Upcoming events

### ETH Quantum Hackathon 2026

- Host: ETH Zürich Quantum Engineering Commission
- Date: May 8–10, 2026
- Location: ETH Hönggerberg Campus, Zürich, Switzerland
- Format: in-person
- Sponsors: Alice & Bob, Zurich Instruments, IQM, QuEra, Quandela, QCentroid
- URL: https://qec.amiv.ethz.ch/qhack26/

### Global Industry Challenge 2026

- Host: Connected DMV
- Date: 2026 (dates TBA)
- Location: Virtual (Global) + Quantum World Congress 2026, Washington DC
- Format: hybrid
- Sponsors: Wells Fargo, MITRE, qBraid, D-Wave, Aqora
- URL: https://www.pqic.org/challenge

### unitaryHACK 2026

- Host: Unitary Foundation
- Date: Jun 3-17, 2026
- Location: Virtual (Global)
- Format: virtual
- Sponsors: Unitary Foundation
- URL: https://unitaryhack.dev

### NYUAD Quantum Hackathon for Social Good 2026

- Host: NYU Abu Dhabi
- Date: Aug 27-30, 2026
- Location: NYUAD Conference Center, Abu Dhabi, UAE
- Format: in-person
- Sponsors: IBM Quantum, Google, Microsoft, Sandbox AQ, CERN Open Quantum Institute, qBraid, ETH Zurich, EPFL QSE, MIT iQuHACK
- URL: https://hackathon.nyuad.nyu.edu/

- Host: The Quantum Insider
- Date: Apr – Nov 2026
- Location: Virtual (Global)
- Format: virtual
- Sponsors: AWS, Classiq, South Carolina Quantum, Airbus, Volkswagen Group, Cleveland Clinic, HSBC, E.ON, MITRE
- URL: https://quantumai.thequantuminsider.com/

- Host: Oak Ridge Leadership Computing Facility
- Date: Fall 2026 (TBD)
- Location: Virtual
- Format: virtual
- Sponsors: Oak Ridge National Laboratory, Quantinuum, IBM, IQM, IonQ
- URL: https://www.olcf.ornl.gov/calendar/fall-2026-qcup-hackathon/

- Host: Haverford, Swarthmore, Bryn Mawr (proposed)
- Date: Nov 2026 (proposed)
- Location: Swarthmore, PA
- Format: in-person
- Sponsors: Haverford Innovations Program
- URL: https://www.swarthmore.edu/center-innovation-leadership/tri-co-hackathon

- Format: in-person

## How to submit an event

To add a hackathon, email brian.pearson@qbraid.com with the event name, host, dates, format, location, official URL, and a short description.

## Contact

Brian Pearson, Head of Business Development, qBraid
brian.pearson@qbraid.com
